requirement_topic.en: Energy Efficiency Grade — Minimum Performance and Grade Label (에너지소비효율등급, KEA/KEMCO)
requirement_topic.zh: 能效等级——最低性能及能效等级标签（에너지소비효율등급，KEA/KEMCO）
requirement_topic.zht: 能效等級——最低性能及能效等級標籤（에너지소비효율등급，KEA/KEMCO）

summary.en: Under South Korea's Energy Use Rationalization Act and the Regulation on Energy Efficiency Labelling and Standards (administered by the Korea Energy Agency (KEA) / KEMCO under MOTIE), designated LED lighting products must meet a Minimum Energy Performance Standard (MEPS) and carry the Korean energy efficiency grade label (에너지소비효율등급), which uses 5 grades from Grade 1 (most efficient) to Grade 5. Products falling below the minimum grade threshold cannot be sold. The applicable efficacy (lm/W), power factor, and related performance criteria are set in the KEA technical operating standard for the specific LED product category (e.g., LED lamps, LED downlights, LED converter-built-in luminaires) — verify the current KEA notice for the exact product type. Self-luminous flux maintenance, colour rendering, and rated lifetime requirements may also apply per the product-category technical standard. Korea's 220 V / 60 Hz grid (vs China's 50 Hz) means efficacy and input-power measurements must be re-confirmed under Korean test conditions.
summary.zh: 依据韩国《能源利用合理化法》及《能效标识及标准规定》（由产业通商资源部下属韩国能源公团（KEA）/KEMCO 管理），指定 LED 照明产品须满足最低能效标准（MEPS）并贴附韩国能效等级标签（에너지소비효율등급），该标签采用 5 个等级，从 1 级（最高效）至 5 级。低于最低等级阈值的产品不得销售。适用的光效（lm/W）、功率因数及相关性能标准由具体 LED 产品类别（如 LED 灯、LED 筒灯、内置转换器 LED 灯具）的 KEA 技术运行标准设定——请核查具体产品类型的现行 KEA 公告。光通量维持率、显色及额定寿命要求亦可能依据产品类别技术标准适用。韩国 220 V / 60 Hz 电网（相对中国 50 Hz）意味着光效及输入功率测量须在韩国测试条件下重新确认。
summary.zht: 依據韓國《能源利用合理化法》及《能效標識及標準規定》（由產業通商資源部下屬韓國能源公團（KEA）/KEMCO 管理），指定 LED 照明產品須滿足最低能效標準（MEPS）並貼附韓國能效等級標籤（에너지소비효율등급），該標籤採用 5 個等級，從 1 級（最高效）至 5 級。低於最低等級閾值的產品不得銷售。適用的光效（lm/W）、功率因數及相關性能標準由具體 LED 產品類別（如 LED 燈、LED 筒燈、內置轉換器 LED 燈具）的 KEA 技術運行標準設定——請核查具體產品類型的現行 KEA 公告。光通量維持率、顯色及額定壽命要求亦可能依據產品類別技術標準適用。韓國 220 V / 60 Hz 電網（相對中國 50 Hz）意味著光效及輸入功率測量須在韓國測試條件下重新確認。

standards_or_laws: Energy Use Rationalization Act + Regulation on Energy Efficiency Labelling and Standards — energy efficiency grade label (에너지소비효율등급) and MEPS for designated LED products (KEA/KEMCO, MOTIE)

summary.en: China's equivalent is GB 30255-2019 (Energy efficiency requirements for LED room luminaires). It defines three energy efficiency grades: Grade 1 (highest): ≥90 lm/W; Grade 2: ≥80 lm/W; Grade 3: ≥70 lm/W. Grade 3 is the minimum required for market entry in China. The China Energy Label (CEL) registration is mandatory for GB 30255-covered products; labels are administered by SAMR. GB 30255 does not comprehensively cover power factor, CRI minimums, or lifetime requirements in the same binding way as the Korean energy efficiency grade scheme.
summary.zh: 中国对应标准为 GB 30255-2019（LED 室内照明产品能效要求），规定三个能效等级：1 级（最高）：≥90 lm/W；2 级：≥80 lm/W；3 级：≥70 lm/W。3 级为中国市场准入最低要求。中国能效标识（CEL）注册对 GB 30255 涵盖产品为强制要求，标识由市场监管总局（SAMR）管理。GB 30255 未以与韩国能效等级方案相同的约束性方式全面涵盖功率因数、最低显色指数或寿命要求。
summary.zht: 中國對應標準為 GB 30255-2019（LED 室內照明產品能效要求），規定三個能效等級：1 級（最高）：≥90 lm/W；2 級：≥80 lm/W；3 級：≥70 lm/W。3 級為中國市場准入最低要求。中國能效標識（CEL）注冊對 GB 30255 涵蓋產品為強制要求，標識由市場監管總局（SAMR）管理。GB 30255 未以與韓國能效等級方案相同的約束性方式全面涵蓋功率因數、最低顯色指數或壽命要求。

standards_or_laws: GB 30255-2019 — Energy efficiency requirements for LED room luminaires (SAC/SAMR)

gap.en: Korea's MEPS minimum grade and China's GB 30255 Grade 3 (≥70 lm/W) are set by different category-specific technical standards and are not directly comparable; a product meeting only CN Grade 3 may not satisfy the Korean minimum grade threshold for its product category. Korea applies a 5-grade scale (Grade 1–5) whereas China uses 3 grades; the calculation basis and product-category boundaries differ. Beyond efficacy, the Korean energy efficiency grade scheme can also require power factor, luminous flux maintenance, and rated lifetime conformity per the KEA product-category technical standard, which CN GB 30255 does not mandate uniformly. Manufacturers must re-test efficacy and input power under Korea's 220 V / 60 Hz conditions and register the product with KEA/KEMCO before affixing the grade label. Always verify the current KEA notice for the specific LED product sub-category.
gap.zh: 韩国 MEPS 最低等级与中国 GB 30255 三级（≥70 lm/W）由不同的类别专用技术标准设定，不可直接比较；仅达到中国 3 级的产品可能无法满足其产品类别的韩国最低等级阈值。韩国采用 5 级制（1–5 级），而中国为 3 级；计算基础及产品类别边界不同。除能效外，韩国能效等级方案还可能依据 KEA 产品类别技术标准要求功率因数、光通量维持率及额定寿命符合性，而中国 GB 30255 并未统一强制。制造商须在韩国 220 V / 60 Hz 条件下重新检测光效和输入功率，并在贴附等级标签前向 KEA/KEMCO 注册产品。请始终核查具体 LED 产品子类别的现行 KEA 公告。
gap.zht: 韓國 MEPS 最低等級與中國 GB 30255 三級（≥70 lm/W）由不同的類別專用技術標準設定，不可直接比較；僅達到中國 3 級的產品可能無法滿足其產品類別的韓國最低等級閾值。韓國採用 5 級制（1–5 級），而中國為 3 級；計算基礎及產品類別邊界不同。除能效外，韓國能效等級方案還可能依據 KEA 產品類別技術標準要求功率因數、光通量維持率及額定壽命符合性，而中國 GB 30255 並未統一強制。製造商須在韓國 220 V / 60 Hz 條件下重新檢測光效和輸入功率，並在貼附等級標籤前向 KEA/KEMCO 注冊產品。請始終核查具體 LED 產品子類別的現行 KEA 公告。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — designated LED products must meet the MEPS minimum grade and carry the Korean energy efficiency grade label (에너지소비효율등급) registered with KEA/KEMCO before market placement under the Energy Use Rationalization Act
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory (minimum Grade 3) — GB 30255-2019 Grade 3 (≥70 lm/W) is the minimum for CN market entry; China Energy Label registration required

source.publisher: Korea Energy Agency (KEA) / KEMCO — Energy Efficiency Labelling and Standards Program

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Designated LED lighting products placed on the South Korea market must meet a Minimum Energy Performance Standard and carry the Korean energy efficiency grade label (에너지소비효율등급, Grade 1–5), registered with KEA/KEMCO under the Energy Use Rationalization Act. Chinese GB 30255 grades (3-grade scale) do not map directly to Korea's 5-grade scale, and a CN Grade 3 product may not meet the Korean minimum. Re-test efficacy and input power under Korea's 220 V / 60 Hz conditions and verify the exact thresholds in the current KEA technical operating standard for the specific product category before market entry.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 进入韩国市场的指定 LED 照明产品须满足最低能效标准并贴附韩国能效等级标签（에너지소비효율등급，1–5 级），依据《能源利用合理化法》向 KEA/KEMCO 注册。中国 GB 30255 等级（3 级制）与韩国 5 级制不可直接映射，中国 3 级产品可能无法满足韩国最低要求。进入市场前，请在韩国 220 V / 60 Hz 条件下重新检测光效和输入功率，并核查具体产品类别现行 KEA 技术运行标准中的确切阈值。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 進入韓國市場的指定 LED 照明產品須滿足最低能效標準並貼附韓國能效等級標籤（에너지소비효율등급，1–5 級），依據《能源利用合理化法》向 KEA/KEMCO 注冊。中國 GB 30255 等級（3 級制）與韓國 5 級制不可直接映射，中國 3 級產品可能無法滿足韓國最低要求。進入市場前，請在韓國 220 V / 60 Hz 條件下重新檢測光效和輸入功率，並核查具體產品類別現行 KEA 技術運行標準中的確切閾值。

requirement_topic.en: Energy Efficiency Grade Label Format and KEA Registration (Korea Energy Boundary)
requirement_topic.zh: 能效等级标签格式及 KEA 注册（韩国能效边界）
requirement_topic.zht: 能效等級標籤格式及 KEA 注冊（韓國能效邊界）

summary.en: Under the Regulation on Energy Efficiency Labelling and Standards (Korea Energy Agency / KEMCO, MOTIE), the manufacturer or importer of a designated LED lighting product must register the product's measured energy performance with KEA before placing it on the market and must display the prescribed Korean energy efficiency grade label (에너지소비효율등급) showing the 1–5 grade band, measured efficacy or power consumption, and the model identification. Mandatory steps before market entry: (1) test the product to the KEA product-category technical operating standard at a designated test institution; (2) determine the grade (1–5) from the measured energy efficiency index against the category boundary values; (3) register the product and report the test results to KEA via the energy efficiency reporting system; (4) display the grade label on the product, packaging, and Korean online product listings. The label artwork and content are prescribed by the KEA notice and differ in format from the EU A–G label.
summary.zh: 依据《能效标识及标准规定》（韩国能源公团 / KEMCO，产业通商资源部），指定 LED 照明产品的制造商或进口商在产品上市前须向 KEA 注册产品的实测能效，并须显示规定的韩国能效等级标签（에너지소비효율등급），标注 1–5 等级、实测光效或功耗及型号识别信息。上市前的强制步骤：（1）由指定检测机构按 KEA 产品类别技术运行标准检测产品；（2）依据实测能效指数对照类别边界值确定等级（1–5）；（3）通过能效申报系统向 KEA 注册产品并报告检测结果；（4）在产品、包装及韩国在线产品列表上显示等级标签。标签图样和内容由 KEA 公告规定，格式不同于欧盟 A–G 标签。
summary.zht: 依據《能效標識及標準規定》（韓國能源公團 / KEMCO，產業通商資源部），指定 LED 照明產品的製造商或進口商在產品上市前須向 KEA 注冊產品的實測能效，並須顯示規定的韓國能效等級標籤（에너지소비효율등급），標註 1–5 等級、實測光效或功耗及型號識別信息。上市前的強制步驟：（1）由指定檢測機構按 KEA 產品類別技術運行標準檢測產品；（2）依據實測能效指數對照類別邊界值確定等級（1–5）；（3）通過能效申報系統向 KEA 注冊產品並報告檢測結果；（4）在產品、包裝及韓國在線產品列表上顯示等級標籤。標籤圖樣和內容由 KEA 公告規定，格式不同於歐盟 A–G 標籤。

standards_or_laws: Regulation on Energy Efficiency Labelling and Standards — Korean energy efficiency grade label (에너지소비효율등급) registration and label format (KEA/KEMCO, MOTIE)

summary.en: China's China Energy Label (CEL) under GB 30255-2019 is mandatory for LED room luminaires. Products must be registered with the CQC (China Quality Certification Centre) or CECP (China Energy Conservation Programme) before affixing the CEL. The CEL shows Grade 1–3 based on absolute lm/W thresholds. There is no mutual recognition between the Korean KEA energy efficiency grade registry and the CN CEL registration scheme.
summary.zh: 中国依据 GB 30255-2019 对 LED 室内照明产品实施强制性中国能效标识（CEL）。产品须在贴附中国能效标识前向中国质量认证中心（CQC）或中国节能产品认证（CECP）进行注册。CEL 依据绝对 lm/W 阈值显示 1–3 级。韩国 KEA 能效等级注册系统与中国能效标识注册方案之间不存在互认。
summary.zht: 中國依據 GB 30255-2019 對 LED 室內照明產品實施強制性中國能效標識（CEL）。產品須在貼附中國能效標識前向中國質量認證中心（CQC）或中國節能產品認證（CECP）進行注冊。CEL 依據絕對 lm/W 閾值顯示 1–3 級。韓國 KEA 能效等級注冊系統與中國能效標識注冊方案之間不存在互認。

standards_or_laws: GB 30255-2019 — Energy efficiency requirements for LED room luminaires (SAC/SAMR)
China Energy Label (CEL) scheme — administered by SAMR/CQC/CECP

gap.en: Korean KEA energy efficiency registration is a mandatory pre-market step with no CN equivalent registry. The Korean grade (1–5 scale) is determined from the measured energy efficiency index against KEA category boundaries, while the CN CEL grade uses absolute lm/W thresholds on a 3-grade scale — they are not directly comparable, and a product's CN grade does not determine its Korean grade. Both schemes are mandatory but non-mutual: a product must be registered separately with KEA for Korea and with CQC/CECP for CN. The Korean grade label artwork and required content are prescribed by KEA notice and differ from the CN CEL. Online retailers selling into Korea must display the Korean energy efficiency grade label on product listing pages — a requirement that CN-market product pages do not carry.
gap.zh: 韩国 KEA 能效注册是强制性上市前步骤，无中国对应注册系统。韩国等级（1–5 制）依据实测能效指数对照 KEA 类别边界确定，而中国能效标识等级采用 3 级制的绝对 lm/W 阈值——两者不可直接比较，产品的中国等级不能决定其韩国等级。两种方案均为强制性但不存在互认：产品须分别向韩国 KEA 注册及在中国向 CQC/CECP 注册。韩国等级标签图样及所需内容由 KEA 公告规定，与中国能效标识不同。向韩国销售的在线零售商须在产品列表页面显示韩国能效等级标签——这是中国市场产品页面所不具备的要求。
gap.zht: 韓國 KEA 能效注冊是強制性上市前步驟，無中國對應注冊系統。韓國等級（1–5 制）依據實測能效指數對照 KEA 類別邊界確定，而中國能效標識等級採用 3 級制的絕對 lm/W 閾值——兩者不可直接比較，產品的中國等級不能決定其韓國等級。兩種方案均為強制性但不存在互認：產品須分別向韓國 KEA 注冊及在中國向 CQC/CECP 注冊。韓國等級標籤圖樣及所需內容由 KEA 公告規定，與中國能效標識不同。向韓國銷售的在線零售商須在產品列表頁面顯示韓國能效等級標籤——這是中國市場產品頁面所不具備的要求。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for designated LED products — KEA energy efficiency registration and the Korean energy efficiency grade label (에너지소비효율등급) required before market placement under the Regulation on Energy Efficiency Labelling and Standards. Scope: applies where the LED product is a designated energy-using product — verify the product category in the current KEA notice.
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — China Energy Label (CEL) registration with CQC/CECP required before affixing CEL under GB 30255-2019

source.publisher: Korea Energy Agency (KEA) / KEMCO — Energy Efficiency Labelling and Standards Program

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] The Korean energy efficiency grade label (에너지소비효율등급) and KEA registration are mandatory for designated LED lighting products under the Regulation on Energy Efficiency Labelling and Standards. Scope clarification: the obligation applies where the LED product is a designated energy-using product — verify the product category in the current KEA notice. Chinese CEL registration does not substitute for KEA registration. The Korean 5-grade index and lm/W-based CN 3-grade are calculated differently and cannot be directly cross-mapped. Register with KEA before first market placement and display the prescribed grade label on product, packaging, and Korean online listings.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 依据《能效标识及标准规定》，韩国能效等级标签（에너지소비효율등급）及 KEA 注册对指定 LED 照明产品为强制要求。适用范围说明：该义务适用于属于指定能源使用产品的 LED 产品——请核查现行 KEA 公告中的产品类别。中国能效标识注册不可替代 KEA 注册。韩国 5 级指数与基于 lm/W 的中国 3 级计算方式不同，不可直接互换。请在首次上市前向 KEA 注册，并在产品、包装及韩国在线列表上显示规定的等级标签。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 依據《能效標識及標準規定》，韓國能效等級標籤（에너지소비효율등급）及 KEA 注冊對指定 LED 照明產品為強制要求。適用範圍說明：該義務適用於屬於指定能源使用產品的 LED 產品——請核查現行 KEA 公告中的產品類別。中國能效標識注冊不可替代 KEA 注冊。韓國 5 級指數與基於 lm/W 的中國 3 級計算方式不同，不可直接互換。請在首次上市前向 KEA 注冊，並在產品、包裝及韓國在線列表上顯示規定的等級標籤。
